creator: ish@amail.plala.or.jp
text:
(In reply to crb from comment #25)

I'm using two HP proliant N54L and ADATA XPG SX6000 Lite M.2 2280 PCIe Gen3x4 SSD 256GB (with 64MB host memory buffer). These ssd are hmpre=hmmin=16384(64MB). The same thing are occuring about two month intervals. Both machine are used ssd for zfs ZIL/L2ARC on FreeBSD 13.1R. I installed these SSDs on 13.0R and they never happend more than 6 months.

I don't think hp proliant server has poor power supply and I think you cannot judge with 2 days.
